label: LLM Completion
description: Send a prompt to a chat-completion model via the platform's OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Supports system + user messages, automatic context injection, and Smart Router model selection.

settings.name: prompt
settings.label: Prompt
settings.description: Templated user-message prompt. Optional when an upstream prompt_template node feeds a `messages` array via the input edge — the executor uses that array verbatim. Required otherwise; the executor surfaces a clear node_error when both are absent.

settings.name: model
settings.label: Model
settings.description: Leave as 'auto' to use Smart Router. Hard-coded model IDs are discouraged.

settings.name: responseFormat
settings.label: Response format
settings.description: Set to `json_object` to force the model to emit a valid JSON object only (no surrounding prose). Translates to `response_format:{type:'json_object'}` on the wire; the Ollama provider further translates to grammar-constrained `format:'json'` so weaker models (e.g. gpt-oss:20b) that ignore prose-level instructions still emit parseable output. Required upstream of a `structured_output` node when the chosen model is not strong on instruction-following.

ai.whenToUse: When you need to summarize, classify, generate, or transform text using an LLM.
ai.examplePrompt: summarize the customer-feedback payload from the trigger and extract the top 3 themes
ai.promptHints: Reference the response with {{steps.<id>.content}}. Leave model as 'auto' so the platform's Smart Router picks the right model.

outputAssertions.name: non_empty_content
outputAssertions.errorMessage: LLM returned an empty completion — usually a provider/model issue or a content-filter rejection.
